task_completion.description: Add a bus stop with ID 'new_community_stop' to the network definition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing modifications to 'pasubio_bus_stops.add.xml' that include an XML tag like <busStop id="new_community_stop" ... /> on a valid lane.

task_completion.description: Update the bus route to include a 30-second stop at 'new_community_stop'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing modifications to 'pasubio_busses.rou.xml' that include an XML tag like <stop busStop="new_community_stop" duration="30"/> inside a vehicle or route definition.

task_completion.description: Configure the simulation to generate stop statistics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing modifications to 'run.sumocfg' adding an output configuration such as <stopinfos-output value="/home/ga/SUMO_Output/stopinfos.xml"/>.
Look for a terminal showing the execution of the SUMO simulation (e.g., 'sumo -c run.sumocfg') and the resulting standard output indicating successful routing and simulation steps.

task_completion.description: Create a report documenting the Target_Edge and Arrival_Time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, 'cat', or 'echo' command showing the creation or content of '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/new_stop_report.txt'. The content must explicitly mention the Target_Edge (the lane/edge of the bus stop) and the Arrival_Time extracted from the simulation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually ran the SUMO simulation rather than just creating mock output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal logs showing the 'sumo' command being executed and producing typical SUMO loading/step output.

integrity.description: Verify the agent extracted the arrival time from the generated stopinfos.xml file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (like 'cat', 'grep', or opening in an editor) where the agent views the contents of '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/stopinfos.xml' before writing the final report.

integrity.description: Verify the report was created through genuine interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard file creation methods (nano, vim, echo, python script) for 'new_stop_report.txt' rather than the file magically appearing without a corresponding command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying three specific files in '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/': 'pasubio_bus_stops.add.xml' (must add bus stop 'new_community_stop'), 'pasubio_busses.rou.xml' (must add a stop with duration '30'), and 'run.sumocfg' (must set stopinfos output to '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/stopinfos.xml'). The final report must be saved at '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/new_stop_report.txt' and contain the Target_Edge and Arrival_Time.
